sources.label: Newsfile - Enablence Q1FY27 $5.3M order for 800G/1.6T optical products (Jun 3, 2026 - pre-window)
StockTitan - Enablence nets $5.3M Q1FY27 AI datacenter order
TMX Newsfile - Enablence press release index (no releases after Jun 3)

verdicts.rankRationale: No new releases since the Jun 3 record $5.3M FR8 order, and yesterday's verdict already demoted the name for post-rerating crowding after a ~535% YTD run; today's -4.8% drift modestly restores asymmetry without changing the setup, so hold at rank 34 on this crowding-sensitive alpha screen.
verdicts.bull: Largest-ever order validates the FR8 wavelength-management ramp into 800G/1.6T transceivers for North American hyperscalers, and the Sivers/O-Net CPO collaboration gives a real CPO bottleneck angle for a $0.19B microcap.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis intact but fully discovered: a +535% YTD microcap with a single validated order bundle is consolidating, and a -4.8% day is noise rather than a re-entry signal.
verdicts.bear: Trailing quarterly revenue of ~US$2.25M against a sustained net loss means the valuation already prices flawless execution; any order slippage or financing need could unwind the rerating violently given microcap liquidity.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Q4FY26 shipment commencement on the $5.3M FR8 order and any follow-on hyperscaler orders or CPO design-win news from the Sivers/O-Net collaboration.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Microcap liquidity and single-bundle validation risk after a ~535% YTD rerating - crowded retail ownership can deleverage fast on any execution delay.
